summary: Add dark mode support to settings panel
description:
**Summary:**
Implement dark mode toggle in user settings that persists across sessions and affects all application pages.

**Business Case:**
Users have requested dark mode for better viewing in low-light conditions. This is a commonly requested feature that improves accessibility and user satisfaction.

**Technical Details:**
- Add toggle component to Settings page
- Store preference in user preferences table
- Create CSS theme variables for dark mode
- Update all components to respect theme setting
- Persist selection in localStorage and database

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User can toggle dark mode from settings
- [ ] Dark mode applies to all pages immediately
- [ ] Preference persists across browser sessions
- [ ] Preference syncs across devices
- [ ] All UI elements are readable in dark mode
- [ ] Performance impact is minimal
- [ ] Tests added for theme switching
- [ ] Code review completed

**Dependencies:**
- UI component library must support theming
- Database schema update required
